name: S-15 (SS-120)
events: 10 May 1943 USS S-15 (Lt.Cdr. F.C. Acker, USN) departed Coco Solo, Panama Canal Zone for Key West, Florida.
15 May 1943 USS S-15 (Lt.Cdr. F.C. Acker, USN) arrived at Key West, Florida.
17 May 1943 USS S-15 (Lt.Cdr. F.C. Acker, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
18 May 1943 USS S-15 (Lt.Cdr. F.C. Acker, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
19 May 1943 USS S-15 (Lt.Cdr. F.C. Acker, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
20 May 1943 USS S-15 (Lt.Cdr. F.C. Acker, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
21 May 1943 USS S-15 (Lt.Cdr. F.C. Acker, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
22 May 1943 USS S-15 (Lt.Cdr. F.C. Acker, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
24 May 1943 USS S-15 (Lt.Cdr. F.C. Acker, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
25 May 1943 USS S-15 (Lt.Cdr. F.C. Acker, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
26 May 1943 USS S-15 (Lt.Cdr. F.C. Acker, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
13 Jun 1943 USS S-15 (Lt.Cdr. F.C. Acker, USN) departed Key West, Florida for Coco Solo, Panama Canal Zone.
2 Jul 1943 USS S-15 (Lt.Cdr. F.C. Acker, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
3 Jul 1943 USS S-15 (Lt.Cdr. F.C. Acker, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
7 Jul 1943 USS S-15 (Lt.Cdr. F.C. Acker, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
8 Jul 1943 USS S-15 (Lt.Cdr. F.C. Acker, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
9 Jul 1943 USS S-15 (Lt.Cdr. F.C. Acker, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
3 Dec 1943 USS S-15 departed Coco Solo, Panama Canal Zone for Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.
7 Dec 1943 USS S-15 arrived at Guantanamo Bay, Cuba from Coco Solo, Panama Canal Zone.
10 Oct 1944 USS S-15 departed the Panama Canal Zone for Trinidad.
17 Oct 1944 USS S-15 arrived at Trinidad from the Panama Canal Zone.
2 Jan 1945 USS S-15 departed Trinidad for Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.
8 Jan 1945 USS S-15 arrived at Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.
23 Mar 1945 USS S-15 departed Guantanamo Bay, Cuba for New London, Connecticut.
3 Apr 1945 USS S-15 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.
